subtitles.original: 本当に全部
subtitles.english: Really, everything...

subtitles.original: AZKiの魔力になっちゃった
subtitles.english: ...has turned into AZKi's magic.

subtitles.original: 見てください。どうですか？
subtitles.english: Please take a look. How is it?

subtitles.original: 尻尾、尻尾も生えてるんです。
subtitles.english: A tail, a tail is also growing!

subtitles.original: フリフリフリフリ
subtitles.english: Wag, wag, wag, wag.

subtitles.original: どうですか？
subtitles.english: How is it?

subtitles.original: はい。ということで今回は、
subtitles.english: Yes. So this time...

subtitles.original: 小悪魔衣装を仕立てていただきました。
subtitles.english: ...I had a little devil outfit tailored.

subtitles.original: どうでしょうか？どうでしょうか？魔力、魔王？
subtitles.english: How is it? How is it? Magic? Demon king?

subtitles.original: 小悪魔です。はい。
subtitles.english: I'm a little devil. Yes.

subtitles.original: 今回ですね、新衣装はこちらの、小悪魔衣装。可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: My new outfit this time is this little devil outfit. Cute, right?

subtitles.original: たくさんスクショも撮ってくださいね。
subtitles.english: Please take lots of screenshots too, okay?

subtitles.original: ということで、この衣装でね、せっかくなので、
subtitles.english: So, since I have this outfit on,

subtitles.original: あの曲を歌っていきたいなと思います。
subtitles.english: I'd like to sing that song.

subtitles.original: もしかしたらね、小悪魔ですから、この姿なら
subtitles.english: Maybe, since I'm a little devil, with this appearance,

subtitles.original: 魔法とかも、使えちゃうんじゃないのかなと。
subtitles.english: magic or something... I might even be able to use!

subtitles.original: ということで、ではですね、次の曲、聴いてください！
subtitles.english: So, please listen to the next song!

subtitles.original: 召喚！
subtitles.english: Summon!

subtitles.original: 自分の過去に囚われ 迷って
subtitles.english: Trapped by my own past and lost within it,

subtitles.original: そうじゃないよと言い聞かせて 全てを
subtitles.english: telling myself, "that's not how it is," to everything,

subtitles.original: 自由に操れるかなんて
subtitles.english: whether I can freely control it all,

subtitles.original: わからないよと空は霞んで 正解はどこ？
subtitles.english: saying "I don't know," the sky grows hazy—where is the correct answer?

subtitles.original: 僕の手のひらに 残る大事なもの
subtitles.english: The important thing remaining in the palm of my hand,

subtitles.original: 忘れない記憶 何度でも
subtitles.english: the unforgettable memory, no matter how many times,

subtitles.original: 君を守り抜くと叫んで
subtitles.english: shouting that I will protect you until the very end,

subtitles.original: 巻き戻しの中 掴んだ愛は そう
subtitles.english: the love I grabbed onto amidst the rewinding of time—yes,

subtitles.original: 離しはしないから
subtitles.english: because I will never let it go.

subtitles.original: 散りばめた想い 今一度きりの願いへ
subtitles.english: The scattered thoughts, now toward this one-time-only wish,

subtitles.original: 次への僕に 託したよ
subtitles.english: I have entrusted it to the next version of myself.

subtitles.original: いつかの約束 光の道しるべになる
subtitles.english: The promise from someday will become a guidepost of light.

subtitles.original: 誓いをさあ君のため 最後まで
subtitles.english: Now, for your sake, I swear an oath until the very end!

subtitles.original: 涙さえ力に変えてきっと 描いていた望む未来へ
subtitles.english: Turning even tears into strength, surely, to the desired future I had envisioned,

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: I will connect it!

subtitles.original: 想像を超える事態に狂って
subtitles.english: Driven mad by a situation that exceeds imagination,

subtitles.original: 爪をたてては もがき足掻いて 心は
subtitles.english: digging in my claws, tossing and turning, struggling, my heart...

subtitles.original: 人生の過ちをもう何回
subtitles.english: just how many times already,

subtitles.original: 繰り返しては嫌いになって 泣いてても
subtitles.english: have I repeated the mistakes of life, growing to hate myself and crying?

subtitles.original: 君の憧れは いつも輝いてた
subtitles.english: Your longing was always shining brightly.

subtitles.original: I'll come back
subtitles.english: I'll come back

subtitles.original: I'll come back
subtitles.english: I'll come back

subtitles.original: To your future
subtitles.english: To your future

subtitles.original: 僕は抗うだろう 運命に
subtitles.english: I will resist against fate.

subtitles.original: Breaking out
subtitles.english: Breaking out

subtitles.original: Breaking out
subtitles.english: Breaking out

subtitles.original: Breaking down
subtitles.english: Breaking down

subtitles.original: 諦めきれないから
subtitles.english: Because I haven't given up!

subtitles.original: 結ばれた意思は 独りきりじゃない強さへ
subtitles.english: The bound will is toward a strength that isn't alone,

subtitles.original: 紡いだ糸を 手繰り寄せ
subtitles.english: drawing closer the spun threads.

subtitles.original: 見つけた瞳は 理想を現実に変える
subtitles.english: The eyes I found change the ideal into reality.

subtitles.original: 世界はそう君のため 最初から
subtitles.english: The world is, yes, for your sake, from the very beginning,

subtitles.original: 胸に抱いた思い出とずっと あの日から続く決意で
subtitles.english: with the memories I held in my chest, and always with the resolve that has continued since that day,

subtitles.original: 飛べるよ
subtitles.english: I can fly,

subtitles.original: Redo
subtitles.english: Redo!

subtitles.original: あずきち生誕祭 まだまだいけますか？
subtitles.english: Azukichi's Birthday Festival! Can we go even further?!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がっていこう！
subtitles.english: Let's heat things up!

subtitles.original: 君がたとえ僕のこと
subtitles.english: Even if you forget about me,

subtitles.original: 忘れても
subtitles.english: even if you do,

subtitles.original: 僕はもう忘れない 誰も傷つけない
subtitles.english: I won't forget anymore, I won't hurt anyone.

subtitles.original: 消えそうな過去を 救い出すための時間よ
subtitles.english: Oh time, meant for rescuing the past that seems about to vanish,

subtitles.original: ここから始まれ
subtitles.english: start from here!

subtitles.original: 巡りゆく一瞬を 今一度きりの願いへ
subtitles.english: The repeating moment, now toward this one-time-only wish,

subtitles.original: 確かに僕は 託された
subtitles.english: certainly, I have been entrusted with it.

subtitles.original: いつかの約束 光の道しるべになる
subtitles.english: The promise from someday will become a guidepost of light...

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation - The Final Pass**

Okay, so I've got this video segment with AZKi, the VTuber, and it looks like a birthday celebration with a song performance ("Redo" - very nice choice!). I need to generate subtitles, and I want them accurate to the spoken words. Let's see...

I have the timestamps for AZKi's talking parts, like her initial introduction with her cute little devil outfit:

*   "本当に全部" (Really, everything...) \[00:00.000 to 00:01.800]
*   "AZKiの魔力になっちゃった" (has turned into AZKi's magic.) \[00:01.800 to 00:05.400]
*   "見てください。どうですか？" (Please look! How is it?) \[00:05.800 to 00:08.500]
*   ...and on it goes, all the way to her introduction of the song with her talk about "magic" and how cute her new outfit is: \[00:08.500 to 01:05.400]

I've also got the "summon" cue at \[01:13.000 to 01:16.000] ("召喚！") and that sets up the music nicely.

Now, for "Redo," I've matched the lyrics to the timestamps. I had to pay close attention to the transitions between lines and ensure precise timings for the lyrics. I double-checked the singing start time for clarity. Here's how the lyrics break down:

*   "自分の過去に囚われ 迷って" (Trapped by my own past and lost within it) \[01:23.800 to 01:28.800]
*   "そうじゃないよと言い聞かせて 全てを" (Telling myself, "that's not how it is," to everything) \[01:28.800 to 01:33.800]
*   ...and the rest, all accurately synced through to: \[01:33.800 to 05:04.500]

I had to be meticulous with the timings, as I always am, so each line perfectly aligns with the vocal track. I verified Konomi Suzuki's spoken parts at the end, too:

*   "あずきち生誕祭 まだまだいけますか？" (Azuki-chi's Birthday Festival! Can we go even further?!) \[04:10.500 to 04:13.000]
*   "盛り上がっていこう！" (Let's heat things up!) \[04:13.000 to 04:16.000]

Every timing is checked, and the translations are spot on. It is ready for the subtitles.
